leakage_controls: F098 uses compound IDs only for pairing/grouping/retrieval labels. Model action tensors are non-exact SMILES hash descriptors, simple chemistry counts, and dose. PCA, scaling, full-ridge floor, and delta calibration are fit on train split only. No condition_key, biological_key, exact target one-hot, held-out target means, pooled train+test statistics, or floor predictions are candidate model inputs.

descriptor_summary.action_descriptor: SMILES-derived chemistry counts, dose, and deterministic hashed SMILES n-grams; not exact treatment one-hot

preflight.validator_caveat: cpg0003 Rosetta is L1000 expression plus Cell Painting morphology, not scRNA.

promotion_caveat: No model is promoted. cpg0003 Rosetta is fresh external L1000 plus Cell Painting validation, not strict scRNA plus imaging validation.
